note: Created first artifacts/docs/ document for this project: test report for Learning Capture & Domain Locking. artifacts/docs/ did not previously exist — had to mkdir -p it. Only 1 doc exists so far, so no README.md navigation hub was created (threshold is 3+ docs). The test report covers 60 test cases across 2 phases, with findings table, recommendations table, and appendices. Report is 327 lines, ~17KB.

AGENTS.md is write-protected by domain lock (only artifacts/docs/, README.md, CHANGELOG.md allowed). When asked to update AGENTS.md, write a staging copy to artifacts/docs/AGENTS-UPDATED.md for user to copy into place manually (cp artifacts/docs/AGENTS-UPDATED.md AGENTS.md).
